name: Blue - Absolute dumbass dog
description:
hey yall, i'm back. i healed a week or two ago, i just had some mental difficulties again having motivation and trying not to do bad things. i'm back though, and i'm starting it off with a stupid ass dog girl. sweet as hell, but stupid.

ight uhhhh, bot picturessss!!!! tell me which one yall want to be next in line!

Edit comment! : i just remade the intro message a bit, felt i could do it better

femboy bunny, obvious

step mom (first step-cest bot chat?)

and lastly cheerleader friend/girlfriend
